rows.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: cost of the task, USD
rows.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

rows.src_en: URL path
rows.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
rows.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

rows.src_en: contains the parameters passed in the request’s URL
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
rows.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

rows.src_en: array of results
rows.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
rows.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

rows.src_en: task identifier of the completed task unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format
rows.desc_en: Identifier (UUID) of the completed task this result belongs to.
rows.title_zh: 该结果所属已完成任务的标识（UUID）。

rows.src_en: search engine specified when setting the task
rows.desc_en: Search engine specified when the task was created.
rows.title_zh: 创建任务时指定的搜索引擎。

rows.src_en: type of search engine can take the following values: shopping
rows.desc_en: Type of search engine used for this result (e.g. `organic`, `shopping`).
rows.title_zh: 本结果所用的搜索引擎类型（如 `organic`、`shopping`）。

rows.src_en: date when the task was posted (in the UTC format)
rows.desc_en: Timestamp (UTC) when the task was posted.
rows.title_zh: 任务提交的时间戳（UTC）。

rows.src_en: user-defined task identifier
rows.desc_en: User-defined task label echoed from the request.
rows.title_zh: 从请求回显的用户自定义任务标签。

rows.src_en: URL for collecting the results of Google Shopping Sellers Advanced task
rows.desc_en: URL for collecting the advanced (structured JSON) results of this completed task.
rows.title_zh: 用于收取该已完成任务 advanced（结构化 JSON）结果的 URL。

rows.src_en: URL for collecting the results of Google Shopping Sellers HTML task
rows.desc_en: URL for collecting the HTML results of this completed task; may be null where HTML output is unavailable for the endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 用于收取该已完成任务 HTML 结果的 URL；若该接口不提供 HTML 输出则可能为 null。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with information about the mobile application specified in a POST request. You will receive its ID, icon, description, reviews count, rating, images, and other data. The results are specific to the `app_id` parameter specified in the POST request.
rows.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed App Store App Info task by its `id`, returning the app's ID, icon, description, reviews, rating, and more.
rows.title_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 App Store 应用详情任务的结构化（advanced）结果，返回应用 ID、图标、描述、评论、评分等。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format you will be able to use it within 30 days to request the results of the task at any time
rows.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
rows.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with information about the App Store application specified in the `app_id` field of the POST request.
rows.desc_en: Queue an App Store App Info task for the app given in `app_id`. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
rows.title_zh: 为 `app_id` 指定的应用排队提交 App Store 应用详情任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

rows.src_en: id of the app required field ID of the mobile application on App Store; you can find the ID in the URL of every app listed on App Store; example: in the URL https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id835599320 the id is 835599320
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the target app on the store. For Google Play it is the package id from the app URL (e.g. `org.telegram.messenger`); for App Store it is the numeric id from the app URL (e.g. `835599320`).
rows.title_zh: 目标应用在商店中的标识。Google Play 为应用 URL 中的包名（如 `org.telegram.messenger`）；App Store 为应用 URL 中的数字 id（如 `835599320`）。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine location required field if you don’t specify location_code if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_code you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations example: West Los Angeles,California,United States
rows.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine location code required field if you don’t specify location_name if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_name you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations example: 9061121
rows.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine language required field if you don’t specify language_code if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_code you can receive the list of available languages with language_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages example: English
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine language code required field if you don’t specify language_name if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_name you can receive the list of available languages with their language_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages example: en
rows.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: task priority optional field can take the following values: 1 – normal execution priority (set by default) 2 – high execution priority You will be additionally charged for the tasks with high execution priority. The cost can be calculated on the Pricing page.
rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
rows.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

rows.src_en: user-defined task identifier optional field the character limit is 255 you can use this parameter to identify the task and match it with the result you will find the specified tag value in the data object of the response
rows.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
rows.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

rows.src_en: URL for sending task results optional field once the task is completed, we will send a POST request with its results compressed in the gzip format to the postback_url you specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in postback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23 learn more on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

rows.src_en: postback_url datatype required field if you specify postback_url corresponds to the datatype that will be sent to your server possible values: advanced
rows.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
rows.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

rows.src_en: notification URL of a completed task optional field when a task is completed we will notify you by GET request sent to the URL you have specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in pingback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23 learn more on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

rows.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

rows.src_en: status code of the task generated by DataForSEO; can be within the following range: 10000-60000
rows.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

rows.src_en: informational message of the task
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: cost of the task, USD
rows.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

rows.src_en: URL path
rows.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
rows.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

rows.src_en: contains the same parameters that you specified in the POST request
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
rows.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

rows.src_en: array of results in this case, the value will be null
rows.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
rows.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with a list of applications published in the top app charts on the App Store platform, including app IDs, ratings, prices, titles, and more. The results are specific to the `app_collection` as well as the location and language parameters specified in the POST request.
rows.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed App Store App List task by its `id`, returning apps from the top charts with IDs, ratings, prices, and titles.
rows.title_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 App Store 榜单任务的结构化（advanced）结果，返回排行榜应用及其 ID、评分、价格与标题。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format you will be able to use it within 30 days to request the results of the task at any time
rows.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
rows.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with a list of mobile applications published in the top app charts on the [App Store](https://) platform. The returned results are specific to the app collection as well as the [language](https://docs.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages.md) and [location](https://docs.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations.md) parameters.
rows.desc_en: Queue an App Store App List task that returns apps from a specified top chart collection. Returns a task `id`.
rows.title_zh: 排队提交 App Store 榜单任务，返回指定榜单集合中的应用。返回任务 `id`。

rows.src_en: app collection required field app collection on App Store from which apps will be collected; you can specify the following values: top_free_ios, top_paid_ios, top_grossing_ios, new_ios, new_free_ios, new_paid_ios
rows.desc_en: Top-chart collection to pull apps from (e.g. Google Play `featured`/`topselling_paid`/`topgrossing`, App Store `top_free_ios`/`top_paid_ios`/`new_ios`). On Google Play, `featured` cannot be combined with `app_category`.
rows.title_zh: 拉取应用所用的榜单集合（如 Google Play `featured`/`topselling_paid`/`topgrossing`，App Store `top_free_ios`/`top_paid_ios`/`new_ios`）。Google Play 上 `featured` 不能与 `app_category` 同时使用。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine location required field if you don’t specify location_code if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_code you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations example: West Los Angeles,California,United States
rows.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine location code required field if you don’t specify location_name if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_name you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations example: 9061121
rows.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine language required field if you don’t specify language_code if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_code you can receive the list of available languages with language_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages example: English
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine language code required field if you don’t specify language_name if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_name you can receive the list of available languages with their language_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages example: en
rows.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: task priority optional field can take the following values: 1 – normal execution priority (set by default) 2 – high execution priority You will be additionally charged for the tasks with high execution priority. The cost can be calculated on the Pricing page.
rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
rows.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

rows.src_en: parsing depth optional field number of apps to be returned from the App Store SERP; we strongly recommend setting the parsing depth in the multiples of 100, because our system processes 100 results in a row; default value: 100 maximum value: 1000 Your account will be billed per each SERP containing up to 100 results; Setting depth above 100 may result in additional charges if the search engine returns more than 100 results; The cost can be calculated on the Pricing page.
rows.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

rows.src_en: application category on the App Store optional field you can filter the results by app category; example: lifestyle; you can review the full list of available categories here or by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/categories
rows.desc_en: App-store category to filter results by (e.g. `lifestyle`, `family`). Fetch valid values from the categories endpoint. On Google Play it cannot be combined with `app_collection: featured`.
rows.title_zh: 用于过滤结果的应用商店分类（如 `lifestyle`、`family`）。可调 categories 接口获取可用取值。Google Play 上不能与 `app_collection: featured` 同时使用。

rows.src_en: user-defined task identifier optional field the character limit is 255 you can use this parameter to identify the task and match it with the result you will find the specified tag value in the data object of the response
rows.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
rows.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

rows.src_en: URL for sending task results optional field once the task is completed, we will send a POST request with its results compressed in the gzip format to the postback_url you specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in postback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23 learn more on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

rows.src_en: postback_url datatype required field if you specify postback_url corresponds to the datatype that will be sent to your server possible values: advanced
rows.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
rows.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

rows.src_en: notification URL of a completed task optional field when a task is completed we will notify you by GET request sent to the URL you have specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in pingback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23 learn more on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

rows.src_en: the current version of the API
rows.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
rows.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

rows.src_en: general status code you can find the full list of the response codes here Note: we strongly recommend designing a necessary system for handling related exceptional or error conditions
rows.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
rows.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

rows.src_en: general informational message you can find the full list of general informational messages here
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: total tasks cost, USD
rows.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasksarray
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

rows.src_en: array of tasks
rows.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
rows.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

rows.src_en: unique task identifier in our system in the Universally unique identifier (UUID) format
rows.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
rows.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

rows.src_en: status code of the task generated by DataForSEO; can be within the following range: 10000-60000
rows.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

rows.src_en: informational message of the task
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: cost of the task, USD
rows.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

rows.src_en: URL path
rows.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
rows.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

rows.src_en: contains the same parameters that you specified in the POST request
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
rows.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

rows.src_en: array of results in this case, the value will be null
rows.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
rows.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with a full list of app categories available on Apple App Store.
rows.desc_en: Return the full list of app categories available on the Apple App Store for app-listing searches.
rows.title_zh: 返回 Apple App Store 上可用于应用列表检索的全部应用分类。

rows.src_en: the current version of the API
rows.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
rows.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

rows.src_en: general status code you can find the full list of the response codes here
rows.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
rows.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

rows.src_en: general informational message you can find the full list of general informational messages here
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: total tasks cost, USD
rows.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasks array
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

rows.src_en: array of tasks
rows.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
rows.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format
rows.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
rows.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

rows.src_en: status code of the task generated by DataForSEO; can be within the following range: 10000-60000 you can find the full list of response codes here
rows.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

rows.src_en: informational message of the task you can find the full list of general informational messages here
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: cost of the task, USD
rows.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

rows.src_en: URL path
rows.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
rows.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

rows.src_en: contains the parameters passed in the URL of the GET request
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
rows.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

rows.src_en: array of results
rows.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
rows.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

rows.src_en: name of the supported app category
rows.desc_en: Name of a supported app category.
rows.title_zh: 某个受支持应用分类的名称。

rows.src_en: number of app listings that make up the supported app category
rows.desc_en: Number of items returned in this result's `items` array.
rows.title_zh: 本结果 `items` 数组中返回的条目数量。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with a list of apps published on App Store along with additional information: its ID, icon, reviews count, rating, price, and other data. The results are specific to the `title`, `description`, and `categories` parameters specified in the API request.
rows.desc_en: Search App Store app listings in real time (Live mode) and return apps with ID, icon, reviews count, rating, price, and more in the same response.
rows.title_zh: 以实时（Live）方式检索 App Store 应用列表，在同一响应中返回应用的 ID、图标、评论数、评分、价格等信息。

rows.src_en: app categories optional field the categories you specify are used to search for app listings; you can get the full list of available app listing categories by this link you can specify up to 10 categories
rows.desc_en: App-listing categories used to scope the search; up to 10 may be specified. Fetch valid values from the app-listings categories endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 用于限定搜索范围的应用分类，最多 10 个。可调 app-listings categories 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: keyword in the app’s description optional field keywords that occur in the description of the app; can contain up to 200 characters
rows.desc_en: Keyword that must appear in the app description (up to 200 chars).
rows.title_zh: 必须出现在应用描述中的关键词（上限 200 字符）。

rows.src_en: keyword in the app’s title optional field keywords that occur in the title of the app; can contain up to 200 characters
rows.desc_en: Keyword that must appear in the app title (up to 200 chars).
rows.title_zh: 必须出现在应用标题中的关键词（上限 200 字符）。

rows.src_en: array of results filtering parameters optional field you can add several filters at once (8 filters maximum) you should set a logical operator and, or between the conditions the following operators are supported: regex, not_regex, , , >, >=, =, , in, not_in, like, not_like you can use the % operator with like and not_like to match any string of zero or more characters example: ["rating.value",">",3] you can receive the list of available filters by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/app_listings/available_filters
rows.desc_en: Array of result-filtering conditions (up to 8), joined by `and`/`or`. Each condition is `[field, operator, value]` (e.g. `["rating.value",">",3]`); operators include comparison, `in`/`not_in`, `like`/`not_like`, `regex`. Fetch supported fields from the available-filters endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 结果过滤条件数组（最多 8 个），用 `and`/`or` 连接。每个条件为 `[字段, 操作符, 值]`（如 `["rating.value",">",3]`）；操作符含比较、`in`/`not_in`、`like`/`not_like`、`regex`。可调 available-filters 接口获取支持的字段。

rows.src_en: results sorting rules optional field you can use the same values as in the filters array to sort the results possible sorting types: asc – results will be sorted in the ascending order desc – results will be sorted in the descending order you should use a comma to set up a sorting parameter example: ["item.rating.value,desc"] note that you can set no more than three sorting rules in a single request you should use a comma to separate several sorting rules example: ["item.rating.value,desc","item.rating.value,desc"]
rows.desc_en: Result sorting rules using the same fields as `filters`, formatted as `field,asc|desc` (e.g. `["item.rating.value,desc"]`). Up to three rules per request.
rows.title_zh: 结果排序规则，使用与 `filters` 相同的字段，格式 `字段,asc|desc`（如 `["item.rating.value,desc"]`）。单次请求最多三条。

rows.src_en: the maximum number of returned apps optional field default value: 100 maximum value: 1000
rows.desc_en: Maximum number of apps to return.
rows.title_zh: 返回应用数量的上限。

rows.src_en: offset in the results array of returned apps optional field default value: 0 if you specify the 10 value, the first ten entities in the results array will be omitted and the data will be provided for the successive entities Note: we recommend using this parameter only when retrieving up to 10,000 results for retrieving over 10,000 results, use the offset_token instead.
rows.desc_en: Number of leading results to skip in the returned array (e.g. `10` omits the first ten). Recommended only up to ~10,000 results; beyond that use `offset_token`.
rows.title_zh: 返回数组中跳过的前导结果数（如 `10` 略过前十条）。建议仅在约 1 万条以内使用；超出请改用 `offset_token`。

rows.src_en: token for subsequent requests optional field provided in the identical filed of the response to each request; use this parameter to avoid timeouts while trying to obtain over 100,000 results in a single request; by specifying the unique offset_token value from the response array, you will get the subsequent results of the initial task; offset_token values are unique for each subsequent task Note: if the offset_token is specified in the request, all other parameters should be identical to the previous request learn more about this parameter on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Pagination token returned in the response of the previous request; pass it back to fetch subsequent results and avoid timeouts on very large result sets. When used, all other parameters must match the previous request, and each token is single-use.
rows.title_zh: 上一次请求响应中返回的分页令牌；回传以获取后续结果并避免超大结果集超时。使用时其余参数须与上次请求一致，且每个令牌仅一次性有效。

rows.src_en: user-defined task identifier optional field the character limit is 255 you can use this parameter to identify the task and match it with the result you will find the specified tag value in the data object of the response
rows.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
rows.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

rows.src_en: the current version of the API
rows.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
rows.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

rows.src_en: general status code you can find the full list of the response codes here Note: we strongly recommend designing a necessary system for handling related exceptional or error conditions
rows.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
rows.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

rows.src_en: general informational message you can find the full list of general informational messages here
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: total tasks cost, USD
rows.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasks array
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasks array that were returned an error
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

rows.src_en: array of tasks
rows.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
rows.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format
rows.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
rows.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

rows.src_en: status code of the task generated by DataForSEO; can be within the following range: 10000-60000 you can find the full list of the response codes here
rows.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

rows.src_en: informational message of the task you can find the full list of general informational messages here
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: cost of the task, USD
rows.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

rows.src_en: URL path
rows.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
rows.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

rows.src_en: contains the same parameters that you specified in the POST request
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
rows.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

rows.src_en: array of results
rows.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
rows.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

rows.src_en: the total number of relevant results in the database
rows.desc_en: Total number of relevant results available in the database for this query.
rows.title_zh: 数据库中该查询的相关结果总数。

rows.src_en: the number of items in the results array
rows.desc_en: Number of items returned in this result's `items` array.
rows.title_zh: 本结果 `items` 数组中返回的条目数量。

rows.src_en: offset in the results array of returned apps
rows.desc_en: Offset applied within the returned apps array.
rows.title_zh: 返回应用数组中所应用的偏移量。

rows.src_en: token for subsequent requests you can use this parameter in the POST request to avoid timeouts while trying to obtain over 100,000 results in a single request
rows.desc_en: Pagination token to pass into a subsequent POST request to retrieve large result sets (over 100,000) without timeouts.
rows.title_zh: 分页令牌，可在后续 POST 请求中回传，以避免超大结果集（超过 10 万条）超时。

rows.src_en: array of apps and related data
rows.desc_en: Array of apps (or products) and their related data returned for the query.
rows.title_zh: 查询返回的应用（或商品）及其相关数据的数组。

rows.src_en: ID of the returned app
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the returned app.
rows.title_zh: 返回应用的标识。

rows.src_en: search engine domain in a POST array
rows.desc_en: Search-engine domain echoed from the POST request for this item.
rows.title_zh: 该条目从 POST 请求回显的搜索引擎域名。

rows.src_en: location code in a POST array
rows.desc_en: Location code echoed from the POST request for this item.
rows.title_zh: 该条目从 POST 请求回显的地区代码。

rows.src_en: language code in a POST array
rows.desc_en: Language code echoed from the POST request for this item.
rows.title_zh: 该条目从 POST 请求回显的语言代码。

rows.src_en: direct URL to search engine results you can use it to make sure that we provided accurate results
rows.desc_en: Direct URL to the search-engine results, usable to verify the returned data.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎结果的直达 URL，可用于核对返回数据。

rows.src_en: date and time when SERP data was last updated in the ISO 8601 format: “YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sssssssZ” example: 2023-05-23 10:16:19 +00:00
rows.desc_en: Timestamp (UTC) when the SERP data was last updated.
rows.title_zh: SERP 数据最后更新的时间戳（UTC）。

rows.src_en: detailed information about the app
rows.desc_en: Detailed information object for the app in this item.
rows.title_zh: 本条目中应用的详细信息对象。

rows.src_en: the item’s type possible item types: "app_store_info_organic"
rows.desc_en: Element type of this item (e.g. `app_store_info_organic`, `google_play_info_organic`).
rows.title_zh: 本条目的元素类型（如 `app_store_info_organic`、`google_play_info_organic`）。

rows.src_en: position within a group of elements with identical type values positions of elements with different type values are omitted from rank_group
rows.desc_en: Rank within the group of items sharing the same `type`; items of differing types are skipped in this count.
rows.title_zh: 在相同 `type` 的条目组内的排名；不同 `type` 的条目不计入。

rows.src_en: absolute rank among all the listed apps absolute position among all apps on the list
rows.desc_en: Absolute rank of the app across the entire returned list, regardless of type.
rows.title_zh: 应用在整个返回列表中的绝对排名，不区分类型。

rows.src_en: the alignment of the element in SERP can take the following values: left
rows.desc_en: Alignment of the element within the SERP (e.g. `left`).
rows.title_zh: 元素在 SERP 中的对齐位置（如 `left`）。

rows.src_en: ID of the returned app
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the returned app.
rows.title_zh: 返回应用的标识。

rows.src_en: title of the returned app
rows.desc_en: Title of the returned app.
rows.title_zh: 返回应用的标题。

rows.src_en: URL to the app page on App Store
rows.desc_en: URL to the app's page on the store.
rows.title_zh: 应用在商店中的页面 URL。

rows.src_en: URL to the app icon
rows.desc_en: URL to the app's icon image.
rows.title_zh: 应用图标图片的 URL。

rows.src_en: description of the returned app
rows.desc_en: Description text of the returned app.
rows.title_zh: 返回应用的描述文本。

rows.src_en: the total number of reviews the app has
rows.desc_en: Total number of reviews the app has.
rows.title_zh: 应用的评论总数。

rows.src_en: average rating of the app
rows.desc_en: Average rating object of the app.
rows.title_zh: 应用的平均评分对象。

rows.src_en: the type of the rating can take the following values: Max5
rows.desc_en: Rating scale type, e.g. `Max5`.
rows.title_zh: 评分量表类型，如 `Max5`。

rows.src_en: the value of the rating
rows.desc_en: The rating value.
rows.title_zh: 评分数值。

rows.src_en: the amount of feedback in this case, the value will be null
rows.desc_en: Number of ratings/feedback contributing to the value; may be null.
rows.title_zh: 构成该评分的投票/反馈数量；可能为 null。

rows.src_en: the maximum value for a rating_type the maximum value for Max5 is 5
rows.desc_en: Maximum possible value for the rating scale (e.g. 5 for `Max5`).
rows.title_zh: 该评分量表的最大可能值（如 `Max5` 为 5）。

rows.src_en: price of the app
rows.desc_en: Price object for the app.
rows.title_zh: 应用的价格对象。

rows.src_en: current price refers to the current price indicated in the element
rows.desc_en: Current price shown for the app.
rows.title_zh: 应用当前显示的价格。

rows.src_en: regular price refers to the regular price indicated in the element
rows.desc_en: Regular (non-discounted) price of the app.
rows.title_zh: 应用的常规（未打折）价格。

rows.src_en: the maximum price refers to the maximum price indicated in the element
rows.desc_en: Maximum price when the app is offered as a price range.
rows.title_zh: 当应用以价格区间提供时的最高价。

rows.src_en: currency of the listed price ISO code of the currency applied to the price
rows.desc_en: ISO currency code of the listed price.
rows.title_zh: 所列价格的 ISO 货币代码。

rows.src_en: price is provided as a range indicates whether a price is provided in a range
rows.desc_en: Indicates whether the price is given as a range rather than a single value.
rows.title_zh: 表示价格是否以区间而非单一数值给出。

rows.src_en: price string in the result raw price string as provided in the result
rows.desc_en: Raw price string exactly as shown in the result.
rows.title_zh: 结果中原样显示的价格字符串。

rows.src_en: indicates whether the app is free
rows.desc_en: Indicates whether the app is free.
rows.title_zh: 表示应用是否免费。

rows.src_en: app category App Store category most relevant to the app
rows.desc_en: Primary store category most relevant to the app.
rows.title_zh: 与应用最相关的主要商店分类。

rows.src_en: list of additional app categories App Store categories relevant to the app
rows.desc_en: Additional store categories relevant to the app.
rows.title_zh: 与应用相关的其他商店分类。

rows.src_en: languages supported in the app
rows.desc_en: Languages supported by the app.
rows.title_zh: 应用支持的语言。

rows.src_en: app advisory rating and usage restrictions
rows.desc_en: App advisory ratings and usage restrictions (e.g. content warnings).
rows.title_zh: 应用的内容分级与使用限制提示（如内容警示）。

rows.src_en: name of the app developer
rows.desc_en: Name of the app developer.
rows.title_zh: 应用开发者名称。

rows.src_en: ID of the developer on App Store
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the developer on the store.
rows.title_zh: 开发者在商店中的标识。

rows.src_en: URL to the developer page on App Store
rows.desc_en: URL to the developer's page on the store.
rows.title_zh: 开发者在商店中的页面 URL。

rows.src_en: current version of the app
rows.desc_en: Current version of the app.
rows.title_zh: 应用的当前版本。

rows.src_en: minimum OS version required to install the app
rows.desc_en: Minimum OS version required to install the app.
rows.title_zh: 安装应用所需的最低操作系统版本。

rows.src_en: size of the app
rows.desc_en: Download size of the app.
rows.title_zh: 应用的下载体积。

rows.src_en: date and time when the app was released in the UTC format: “yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”; example: 2019-11-15 12:57:46 +00:00
rows.desc_en: Date and time the app was first released, in UTC (`yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`).
rows.title_zh: 应用首次发布的日期时间，UTC 格式（`yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`）。

rows.src_en: date and time when the app was last updated in the UTC format: “yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00”; example: 2019-11-15 12:57:46 +00:00
rows.desc_en: Date and time the app was last updated, in UTC (`yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`).
rows.title_zh: 应用最后更新的日期时间，UTC 格式（`yyyy-mm-dd hh-mm-ss +00:00`）。

rows.src_en: update notes contains the latest update notes from the developer
rows.desc_en: Latest update notes provided by the developer.
rows.title_zh: 开发者提供的最新更新说明。

rows.src_en: app images contains URLs to the images published on the app page on App Store
rows.desc_en: URLs to the screenshots/images shown on the app's store page.
rows.title_zh: 应用商店页面所展示截图/图片的 URL。

rows.src_en: similar apps displays apps similar to the app in a POST request
rows.desc_en: List of apps similar to this app.
rows.title_zh: 与本应用相似的应用列表。

rows.src_en: ID of the app
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the similar app.
rows.title_zh: 相似应用的标识。

rows.src_en: title of the app
rows.desc_en: Title of the similar app.
rows.title_zh: 相似应用的标题。

rows.src_en: URL to the app page on App Store
rows.desc_en: URL to the similar app's store page.
rows.title_zh: 相似应用商店页面的 URL。

rows.src_en: similar apps information about apps built by the same developer
rows.desc_en: Other apps built by the same developer.
rows.title_zh: 同一开发者发布的其他应用。

rows.src_en: ID of the app
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the developer's other app.
rows.title_zh: 该开发者其他应用的标识。

rows.src_en: title of the app
rows.desc_en: Title of the developer's other app.
rows.title_zh: 该开发者其他应用的标题。

rows.src_en: URL to the app page on App Store
rows.desc_en: URL to the developer's other app store page.
rows.title_zh: 该开发者其他应用商店页面的 URL。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with feedback data on applications listed on the App Store platform, including review ratings, review content, user profile info of each reviewer, review publication dates, and more. The results are specific to the `app_id` as well as the location and language parameters specified in the POST request.
rows.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed App Store App Reviews task by its `id`, including review ratings, content, and user profile info.
rows.title_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 App Store 评论任务的结构化（advanced）结果，含评论评分、内容与用户资料信息。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format you will be able to use it within 30 days to request the results of the task at any time
rows.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
rows.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with reviews published on the App Store platform for the app specified in the `app_id` field. The returned results are specific to the indicated [language](https://docs.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages.md) and [location](https://docs.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations.md) parameters.
rows.desc_en: Queue an App Store App Reviews task for the app given in `app_id`. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
rows.title_zh: 为 `app_id` 指定的应用排队提交 App Store 评论任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

rows.src_en: id of the app required field ID of the mobile application on App Store; you can find the ID in the URL of every app listed on App Store; example: in the URL https://apps.apple.com/us/app/id835599320 the id is 835599320
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the target app on the store. For Google Play it is the package id from the app URL (e.g. `org.telegram.messenger`); for App Store it is the numeric id from the app URL (e.g. `835599320`).
rows.title_zh: 目标应用在商店中的标识。Google Play 为应用 URL 中的包名（如 `org.telegram.messenger`）；App Store 为应用 URL 中的数字 id（如 `835599320`）。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine location required field if you don’t specify location_code if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_code you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations example: West Los Angeles,California,United States
rows.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine location code required field if you don’t specify location_name if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_name you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations example: 9061121
rows.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine language required field if you don’t specify language_code if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_code you can receive the list of available languages with language_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages example: English
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine language code required field if you don’t specify language_name if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_name you can receive the list of available languages with their language_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages example: en
rows.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: task priority optional field can take the following values: 1 – normal execution priority (set by default) 2 – high execution priority You will be additionally charged for the tasks with high execution priority. The cost can be calculated on the Pricing page.
rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
rows.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

rows.src_en: parsing depth optional field number of reviews to be returned in the API response; we strongly recommend setting the parsing depth in the multiples of 50, because our system processes 50 reviews in a row; default value: 50; maximum value: 500; Your account will be billed per each SERP containing up to 50 results; Setting depth above 50 may result in additional charges if the search engine returns more than 50 results; The cost can be calculated on the Pricing page.
rows.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

rows.src_en: results sorting parameters optional field you can use this field to sort the results; possible types of sorting: most_recent — sort by the most recent reviews; most_helpful — sort by the most relevant reviews; default rule: most_helpful
rows.desc_en: Sorting of returned reviews: `most_recent` (most recent) or `most_helpful`. Default is `most_helpful`.
rows.title_zh: 返回评论的排序：`most_recent`（最新）或 `most_helpful`。默认 `most_helpful`。

rows.src_en: user-defined task identifier optional field the character limit is 255 you can use this parameter to identify the task and match it with the result you will find the specified tag value in the data object of the response
rows.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
rows.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

rows.src_en: URL for sending task results optional field once the task is completed, we will send a POST request with its results compressed in the gzip format to the postback_url you specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in postback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23 learn more on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

rows.src_en: postback_url datatype required field if you specify postback_url corresponds to the datatype that will be sent to your server possible values: advanced
rows.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
rows.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

rows.src_en: notification URL of a completed task optional field when a task is completed we will notify you by GET request sent to the URL you have specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in pingback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23 learn more on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

rows.src_en: the current version of the API
rows.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
rows.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

rows.src_en: general status code you can find the full list of the response codes here Note: we strongly recommend designing a necessary system for handling related exceptional or error conditions
rows.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
rows.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

rows.src_en: general informational message you can find the full list of general informational messages here
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: total tasks cost, USD
rows.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasksarray
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

rows.src_en: array of tasks
rows.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
rows.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

rows.src_en: unique task identifier in our system in the Universally unique identifier (UUID) format
rows.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
rows.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

rows.src_en: status code of the task generated by DataForSEO; can be within the following range: 10000-60000
rows.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

rows.src_en: informational message of the task
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: cost of the task, USD
rows.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

rows.src_en: URL path
rows.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
rows.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

rows.src_en: contains the same parameters that you specified in the POST request
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
rows.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

rows.src_en: array of results in this case, the value will be null
rows.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
rows.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with a list of apps ranking on the App Store for the `keyword` specified in a POST request. You will also receive additional information about each application: its ID, icon, reviews count, rating, price, and other data. The results are specific to the `keyword` as well as location and language parameters specified in the POST request.
rows.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed App Store App Searches task by its `id`, listing apps ranking for the posted keyword.
rows.title_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 App Store 关键词搜索任务的结构化（advanced）结果，列出对应关键词下排名的应用。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format you will be able to use it within 30 days to request the results of the task at any time
rows.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
rows.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with a list of apps ranking on the App Store for the specified `keyword`. The returned results are specific to the indicated keyword, as well as the location and language parameters.
rows.desc_en: Queue an App Store App Searches task that returns apps ranking for a keyword. Returns a task `id`.
rows.title_zh: 排队提交 App Store 关键词搜索任务，返回某关键词下排名的应用。返回任务 `id`。

rows.src_en: keyword required field you can specify up to 700 characters in the keyword field; all %## will be decoded (plus character ‘+’ will be decoded to a space character); if you need to use the “%” character for your keyword, please specify it as “%25”; if you need to use the “+” character for your keyword, please specify it as “%2B” learn more about rules and limitations of keyword and keywords fields in DataForSEO APIs in this Help Center article
rows.desc_en: Search query (product name or app keyword) to run. Up to 700 characters; `%##` sequences are URL-decoded and `+` becomes a space, so encode a literal `%` as `%25` and a literal `+` as `%2B`.
rows.title_zh: 要检索的搜索词（商品名或应用关键词）。上限 700 字符；`%##` 会被解码、`+` 会被解码为空格，故字面 `%` 写作 `%25`、字面 `+` 写作 `%2B`。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine location required field if you don’t specify location_code if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_code you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations example: West Los Angeles,California,United States
rows.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine location code required field if you don’t specify location_name if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_name you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/locations example: 9061121
rows.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine language required field if language_code is not specified if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_code you can receive the list of available languages with language_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages example: English
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine language code required field if language_name is not specified if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_name you can receive the list of available languages with their language_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/apple/languages example: en
rows.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: task priority optional field can take the following values: 1 – normal execution priority (set by default) 2 – high execution priority You will be additionally charged for the tasks with high execution priority. The cost can be calculated on the Pricing page.
rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
rows.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

rows.src_en: parsing depth optional field number of results to be returned from the App Store SERP; we strongly recommend setting the parsing depth in the multiples of 100, because our system processes 100 results in a row; default value: 100 maximum value: 700 Your account will be billed per each SERP containing up to 100 results; Setting depth above 100 may result in additional charges if the search engine returns more than 100 results; The cost can be calculated on the Pricing page.
rows.desc_en: Parsing depth — how many results/reviews/apps to return. Best set in multiples of the per-page batch size; raising it above one batch may add charges if extra results are returned. Limits vary by endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 解析深度——返回的结果/评论/应用数量。建议设为单页批量的整数倍；超过一个批量时若返回更多结果可能额外计费。上限因接口而异。

rows.src_en: user-defined task identifier optional field the character limit is 255 you can use this parameter to identify the task and match it with the result you will find the specified tag value in the data object of the response
rows.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
rows.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

rows.src_en: URL for sending task results optional field once the task is completed, we will send a POST request with its results compressed in the gzip format to the postback_url you specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in postback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23 learn more on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

rows.src_en: postback_url datatype required field if you specify postback_url corresponds to the datatype that will be sent to your server possible values: advanced
rows.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
rows.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

rows.src_en: notification URL of a completed task optional field when a task is completed we will notify you by GET request sent to the URL you have specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in pingback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23 learn more on our Help Center
rows.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

rows.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
rows.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。

rows.src_en: general status code you can find the full list of the response codes here
rows.desc_en: Overall response status code for the request. Use it to detect success vs. error conditions; see the DataForSEO status-code reference for the full list.
rows.title_zh: 整个请求的总体状态码。用于判断成功或错误；完整列表见 DataForSEO 状态码参考。

rows.src_en: general informational message you can find the full list of general informational messages here
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message accompanying the overall `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 与总体 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Total processing time of the request, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 请求的总处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: total tasks cost, USD
rows.desc_en: Total cost of all tasks in this response, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 本次响应中所有任务的总费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasks array
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks contained in the `tasks` array.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中包含的任务数量。

rows.src_en: the number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error
rows.desc_en: Number of tasks in the `tasks` array that returned an error.
rows.title_zh: `tasks` 数组中返回错误的任务数量。

rows.src_en: array of tasks
rows.desc_en: Array of task objects, each carrying the status and results of one submitted task.
rows.title_zh: 任务对象数组，每个元素承载一个已提交任务的状态与结果。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format
rows.desc_en: Unique identifier (UUID) of the task within the DataForSEO system.
rows.title_zh: 任务在 DataForSEO 系统中的唯一标识（UUID）。

rows.src_en: status code of the task generated by DataForSEO; can be within the following range: 10000-60000 you can find the full list of response codes here
rows.desc_en: Per-task status code (range 10000-60000) indicating how this individual task resolved.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的状态码（取值 10000-60000），表示该任务的处理结果。

rows.src_en: informational message of the task you can find the full list of general informational messages here
rows.desc_en: Human-readable message for this task's `status_code`.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `status_code` 对应的可读说明信息。

rows.src_en: execution time, seconds
rows.desc_en: Processing time of this individual task, in seconds.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的处理耗时，单位秒。

rows.src_en: cost of the task, USD
rows.desc_en: Cost of this individual task, in USD.
rows.title_zh: 单个任务的费用，单位美元。

rows.src_en: number of elements in the result array
rows.desc_en: Number of elements in this task's `result` array.
rows.title_zh: 该任务 `result` 数组中的元素数量。

rows.src_en: URL path
rows.desc_en: API URL path segments that identify the endpoint this task was routed to.
rows.title_zh: 标识该任务所路由接口的 API URL 路径片段。

rows.src_en: contains the parameters passed in the URL of the GET request
rows.desc_en: Echo of the parameters supplied when the task was created (POST body or GET URL parameters).
rows.title_zh: 创建任务时所提供参数的回显（POST 请求体或 GET URL 参数）。

rows.src_en: array of results
rows.desc_en: Array of result objects for the task. For a just-posted task this is null and is populated once the task completes.
rows.title_zh: 任务的结果对象数组。对刚提交的任务此处为 null，任务完成后才会填充。

rows.src_en: location code
rows.desc_en: Location code applied to this result.
rows.title_zh: 本结果所应用的地区代码。

rows.src_en: full name of the location
rows.desc_en: Full name of the supported location.
rows.title_zh: 受支持地区的完整名称。

rows.src_en: the name of the superordinate location example: "location_code": 1006473, "location_name": "Altrincham,England,United Kingdom", "location_name_parent": "England,United Kingdom", where location_name_parent corresponds to: "location_code": 20339, "location_name": "England,United Kingdom" note: Apple App Data API currently supports countries only, that is why this value will always be null
rows.desc_en: Name of the superordinate (parent) location; for example the parent of `Altrincham,England,United Kingdom` is `England,United Kingdom`.
rows.title_zh: 上级（父）地区名称；例如 `Altrincham,England,United Kingdom` 的父级为 `England,United Kingdom`。

rows.src_en: ISO country code of the location
rows.desc_en: ISO country code of the location.
rows.title_zh: 该地区的 ISO 国家代码。

rows.src_en: location type
rows.desc_en: Type of the location (e.g. country, city).
rows.title_zh: 地区类型（如国家、城市）。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with information about the mobile application specified in a POST request. You will receive its ID, icon, description, reviews count, rating, number of installs, images, and other data. The results are specific to the `app_id` parameter specified in the POST request.
rows.desc_en: Collect the structured (advanced) results of a completed Google Play App Info task by its `id`, returning the app's ID, icon, description, reviews, rating, and more.
rows.title_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 应用详情任务的结构化（advanced）结果，返回应用 ID、图标、描述、评论、评分等。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format you will be able to use it within 30 days to request the results of the task at any time
rows.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
rows.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

rows.src_en: ![checked](https://docs.dataforseo.com/v3/wp-content/themes/dataforseo/assets/img/icons/checked-circle.svg) GET https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app\_data/google/app\_info/task\_get/html/$id
rows.desc_en: Collect the raw HTML results of a completed Google Play App Info task by its `id`.
rows.title_zh: 按任务 `id` 收取已完成 Google Play 应用详情任务的原始 HTML 结果。

rows.src_en: task identifier unique task identifier in our system in the UUID format you will be able to use it within 7 days to request the results of the task at any time
rows.desc_en: Task identifier (UUID) returned when posting a task; use it with the matching Task GET endpoint to collect the results within the task retention window.
rows.title_zh: 提交任务时返回的任务标识（UUID）；在任务保留期内用它调用对应的 Task GET 接口收取结果。

rows.src_en: This endpoint will provide you with information about the Google Play application specified in the `app_id` field of the POST request.
rows.desc_en: Queue a Google Play App Info task for the app given in `app_id`. Returns a task `id` to collect later.
rows.title_zh: 为 `app_id` 指定的应用排队提交 Google Play 应用详情任务。返回任务 `id`，稍后收取。

rows.src_en: id of the app required field ID of the mobile application on Google Play; you can find the ID in the URL of every app listed on Google Play; example: in the URL https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.telegram.messenger the id is org.telegram.messenger
rows.desc_en: Identifier of the target app on the store. For Google Play it is the package id from the app URL (e.g. `org.telegram.messenger`); for App Store it is the numeric id from the app URL (e.g. `835599320`).
rows.title_zh: 目标应用在商店中的标识。Google Play 为应用 URL 中的包名（如 `org.telegram.messenger`）；App Store 为应用 URL 中的数字 id（如 `835599320`）。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine location required field if you don’t specify location_code if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_code you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/google/locations example: West Los Angeles,California,United States
rows.desc_en: Full location name for the search engine (e.g. `London,England,United Kingdom`). Use this when not setting `location_code`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的完整名称（如 `London,England,United Kingdom`）。未设 `location_code`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine location code required field if you don’t specify location_name if you use this field, you don’t need to specify location_name you can receive the list of available locations of the search engine with their location_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/google/locations example: 9061121
rows.desc_en: Numeric location code for the search engine (e.g. `9045969`). Use this when not setting `location_name`/`location_coordinate`; fetch valid values from the corresponding locations endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎地区的数字代码（如 `9045969`）。未设 `location_name`/`location_coordinate` 时使用；可调对应 locations 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: full name of search engine language required field if language_code is not specified if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_code you can receive the list of available languages with language_name by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/google/languages example: English
rows.desc_en: Full language name for the search engine (e.g. `English (United Kingdom)`). Use when not setting `language_code`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言的完整名称（如 `English (United Kingdom)`）。未设 `language_code` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: search engine language code required field if language_name is not specified if you use this field, you don’t need to specify language_name you can receive the list of available languages with their language_code by making a separate request to https://api.dataforseo.com/v3/app_data/google/languages example: en
rows.desc_en: Language code for the search engine (e.g. `en_GB` for Amazon, `en` for app stores). Use when not setting `language_name`; fetch valid values from the corresponding languages endpoint.
rows.title_zh: 搜索引擎语言代码（Amazon 如 `en_GB`，应用商店如 `en`）。未设 `language_name` 时使用；可调对应 languages 接口获取可用取值。

rows.src_en: task priority optional field can take the following values: 1 – normal execution priority (set by default) 2 – high execution priority You will be additionally charged for the tasks with high execution priority. The cost can be calculated on the Pricing page.
rows.desc_en: Execution priority of the task: `1` normal (default), `2` high. High priority speeds up processing but incurs additional charges.
rows.title_zh: 任务执行优先级：`1` 普通（默认），`2` 高。高优先级加速处理但会额外计费。

rows.src_en: user-defined task identifier optional field the character limit is 255 you can use this parameter to identify the task and match it with the result you will find the specified tag value in the data object of the response
rows.desc_en: User-defined task label (up to 255 chars) echoed back in the response `data` object, so you can match results to the task you posted.
rows.title_zh: 用户自定义任务标签（上限 255 字符），会在响应 `data` 对象中回显，便于将结果与所提交任务对应。

rows.src_en: URL for sending task results optional field once the task is completed, we will send a POST request with its results compressed in the gzip format to the postback_url you specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/postbackscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in postback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23
rows.desc_en: Callback URL to which a gzip-compressed POST with the task results is sent once the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders that are substituted before sending.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成后接收结果的回调 URL，结果以 gzip 压缩经 POST 发送。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，发送前会被替换。

rows.src_en: postback_url datatype required field if you specify postback_url corresponds to the datatype that will be sent to your server possible values: advanced, html
rows.desc_en: Result datatype delivered to `postback_url`; required when `postback_url` is set. Selects which task-result format is pushed (e.g. `advanced`, `html`).
rows.title_zh: 推送到 `postback_url` 的结果数据类型；设置 `postback_url` 时必填。决定推送哪种任务结果格式（如 `advanced`、`html`）。

rows.src_en: notification URL of a completed task optional field when a task is completed we will notify you by GET request sent to the URL you have specified you can use the ‘$id’ string as a $id variable and ‘$tag’ as urlencoded $tag variable. We will set the necessary values before sending the request. example: http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id http://your-server.com/pingscript?id=$id&tag=$tag Note: special characters in pingback_url will be urlencoded; i.a., the # character will be encoded into %23
rows.desc_en: Notification URL pinged via GET when the task completes. Supports `$id` and url-encoded `$tag` placeholders substituted before the request is sent.
rows.title_zh: 任务完成时以 GET 通知的回调 URL。支持 `$id` 与经 url 编码的 `$tag` 占位符，请求发送前会被替换。

rows.src_en: the current version of the API
rows.desc_en: Current version of the DataForSEO API that served the response.
rows.title_zh: 处理本次响应的 DataForSEO API 当前版本号。
